4 DAYS OF EVENT

## PROGRAM SCHEDULE

We've designed & curated a program to provide you with maximum value, intrigue, and fun.

// PROGRAM\_STRUCTURE

DAY 1

Workshop Day + Expo/Reception

45+ workshops, 80min to 3h sessions

DAY 2

Keynotes + 10 Parallel Engineering Tracks

90min keynotes + breakout sessions + dedicated Leadership Track + afterparty

DAY 3

Keynotes + Breakouts + World Cup

No afterparty — we encourage side events! World Cup quarterfinal day ⚽

DAY 4

Final Day + Expo Stage

Debates, demos, performances — no afterparty, side events encouraged!

// HIGHLIGHTS

* ✓45+ workshops on day 1
* ✓10 parallel engineering tracks + dedicated Leadership Track on main days
* ✓100+ expo partners throughout
* ✓World Cup Quarterfinal VIP Suite (July 1, Levi's Stadium — invite only, sponsorships available)
* ✓No afterparties July 1 & 2 — side events encouraged, especially for the World Cup quarterfinal!

[Schedule not yet announced — apply to speak →](https://app.ai.engineer/e/ai-engineer-worlds-fair-2026/speaker-registration)

## MOSCONE WEST

Moscone West is the crown jewel of San Francisco's three convention centers. Constructed in 2003, it is the city's most modern and most striking: with 27' high ceilings & floor-to-ceiling glass facades that wrap the 3-story building.

With three levels of the same dimensions connected by a single lobby and dual-escalator sets + multiple staircases and multiple elevator shafts, it is simple to understand and efficient to navigate:

FLOOR 1: REG, EXPO, FOOD, EVENING SOCIALS

FLOOR 2: BREAKOUTS

FLOOR 3: KEYNOTE + VIP ROOMS

## BOOK YOUR HOTEL ROOM

Book your room at the San Francisco Marriott Marquis, Parc 55, or InterContinental at our group conference discount, for the 4th year running! Due to the US World Cup we expect this year's room block to sell out MUCH faster than ever in our history. **DO NOT DELAY.**

[SAN FRANCISCO MARRIOTT MARQUISSELLING OUT](https://book.passkey.com/e/51164469)[PARC 55 SAN FRANCISCO](https://book.passkey.com/e/51180684)[INTERCONTINENTAL SAN FRANCISCO](https://www.ihg.com/hotels/us/en/find-hotels/select-roomrate?fromRedirect=true&qSrt=sAV&qIta=99801505&icdv=99801505&qSlH=sfohb&qCiD=27&qCiMy=052026&qCoD=04&qCoMy=062026&qGrpCd=ae3&qAAR=6CBARC&qRtP=6CBARC&setPMCookies=true&qSHBrC=IC&qDest=888%20Howard%20Street,%20San%20Francisco,%20CA,%20US&showApp=true&adjustMonth=false&srb_u=1&qRmFltr=)

Booth options are available but selling fast. Secure your spot at the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026.

[BECOME A SPONSOR](mailto:sponsorships@ai.engineer)

For general questions or FAQ, email[info@ai.engineer](mailto:info@ai.engineer)

# One Event, One Venue - The Entire Convention Center

GenAI Summit SF 2026 will be held at the Palace of Fine Arts, San Francisco from July 18th to 19th, 2026 and is expected to welcome 30,000+ attendees, 400+ Speakers, 300+ Exhibitors, and 1,000+ VCs, alongside extensive media coverage.

Bringing together industry leaders, developers, researchers, investors, and business strategists, GenAI Summit SF 2026 will serve as a premier platform for networking, knowledge-sharing, and showcasing the latest advancements in AI.

![SF AI cover photo](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/2/c/f/5/clean_507371509.webp)

[# SF AI](https://www.meetup.com/sfbay-ai/)

4.6•[1340 ratings](https://www.meetup.com/sfbay-ai/feedback-overview/)

[San Francisco, CA, US](/find/us--ca--san-francisco/)

[16,008 members](https://www.meetup.com/sfbay-ai/members/)

[![photo icon](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/next/images/complex-icons/branded/photo.webp?w=64)Photos](/sfbay-ai/photos/)

[![chat icon](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/next/images/complex-icons/branded/chat.webp?w=64)Discussions](https://www.meetup.com/sfbay-ai/discussions/)

## About us

Join us to learn and practice AI, LLMs, GenAI, Agentic AI, Machine learning, Deep learning and Data Science technology together with like-minded developers.

Our goal is to congregate with AI enthusiasts from all over San Francisco Bay area to learn and practice AI tech, through tech talks, workshops, code labs etc.. we regularly invite tech leads from innovated companies, successful startups to share their practice experiences and practices in the world of AI, GenAI, LLMs, Agents, ML and Data.

If you’d like to speak at future meetups, co-promote your meetup or inquire about partnership opportunities, please feel free to reach out to us (info AT aicamp DOT ai)

## Upcoming events

2

[See all](https://www.meetup.com/sfbay-ai/events/)

* [![Making Agentic AI Enterprise-Ready](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/a/0/6/3/highres_533621059.jpeg)

  ### Making Agentic AI Enterprise-Ready

  Capgemini Applied Innovation Exchange, 425 Brannan Street, San Francisco, CA, US

  Register on [AICamp website](https://www.aicamp.ai/event/eventdetails/W2026043018) is REQUIRED for admission.

  **Description:**  
   Agentic AI is moving fast from prototypes to real enterprise use, but one major challenge remains: memory, context, and how agents actually learn and operate over time instead of just responding to prompts. At the Applied Innovation Exchange, this event will bring together startup founders, builders, and enterprise leaders to explore what it really takes to make Agentic AI enterprise-ready.

  The discussion will cover both business and technology perspectives, from new enterprise architectures and agent platforms to orchestration frameworks, memory layers, and multi-agent systems.

  If you are working with or interested in ecosystems around agent frameworks, retrieval and memory systems, and the next generation of AI application stacks, this will be an evening to meet the people building this space and to discuss where enterprise AI is actually heading next.

  **Agenda:**  
   - 5:00pm~5:30pm: Checkin, food and networking  
   - 5:30pm~7:30pm: Tech talks and Q&A  
   - 7:30pm~8:00pm: Open discussion, Mixer and Closing.

  **Speakers:**

  + Jerry Liu, Co-Founder and CEO, LlamaIndex
  + João (Joe) Moura, Founder and CEO, CrewAI
  + Tara Khani, Co-Founder and CEO, Moorcheh.ai
  + Majid Fekri, Co-Founder and CTO, Moorcheh.ai

  **Venue:**  
   Capgemini Applied Innovation Exchange (1011 3rd St., San Francisco)

  **Speakers/Topics:**  
   If you have a keen interest in speaking to our community, we invite you to submit topics for consideration: [Submit Topics](https://forms.gle/JkMt91CZRtoJBSFUA)

  **Sponsors:**  
   We are actively seeking sponsors to support our community. Whether it is by offering venue spaces, providing food/drink, or cash sponsorship. Sponsors will not only speak at the meetups, receive prominent recognition, but also gain exposure to our extensive membership base of 50,000+ AI developers in San Francisco and 500K+ in global.

  42 attendees](https://www.meetup.com/sfbay-ai/events/314204830/?eventOrigin=group_upcoming_events)
* [![NVFLARE 2026 Q2 Webina: From Static to Elastic: Enterprise FLARE on Kubernetes](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/2/c/f/5/highres_507371509.jpeg)

  ### NVFLARE 2026 Q2 Webina: From Static to Elastic: Enterprise FLARE on Kubernetes

  ·

  Online

  Online

   9:00 am PT -- 9:05 am PT Member joining  
   9:05 am PT -- 9:35 am PT FLARE native K8s support & QA  
   9:35 am PT -- 09:55 am PT K8s deployment Demo  
   9:55 am PT -- 10:30 am PT FLARE new feature demo

  Join on AI Camp or SF AI :

  Microsoft Teams meeting  
   Join: [https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/28528841719649?p=gVmjDIcylJR7jZTbxp](https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/28528841719649?p=gVmjDIcylJR7jZTbxp "https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/28528841719649?p=gVmjDIcylJR7jZTbxp")  
   Meeting ID: 285 288 417 196 49  
   Passcode: if9uh6gC

  \*\*\*

  **Abstract:**

  **Learn how NVIDIA FLARE enables Kubernetes-native enterprise deployment for federated learning across on-prem and cloud environments. We will cover close K8s integration for elastic Server/Client Job Pods, decoupled control and execution design, and multi-project isolation for stronger security.**

[AI & Data Summit San Francisco](https://event.idc.com/event/ai-data-summit-san-francisco/ "AI & Data Summit San Francisco")

[REGISTER NOW](https://events.idc.com/d/55qjq1/4W?locale=en-US)   [BECOME A PARTNER](https://www.idc.com/events/become-a-sponsor/?utm_source=ai-summit-frisco#form-events-sponsor)



# AI & Data Summit San Francisco

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/AI-Data-Summit_background-1.png)

# AI & Data Summit San Francisco

### Unlocking the Power of Data and AI

4 Jun 2026 | Convene 100 Stockton (Union Square)

[REGISTER NOW](https://events.idc.com/d/55qjq1/4W?locale=en-US)   [Become a Partner](https://www.idc.com/events/become-a-sponsor/?utm_source=ai-summit-frisco#form-events-sponsor)

![Slide](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/1-e1770658743596.jpg)

![Slide](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/idc-355_websize-2.jpg)

![Slide](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/9ba1e938ed244977a19417b2ea5feb46.jpg)

## Building Intelligence that Creates Real Value​

The IDC AI and Data Summit is the premier event for senior technology and business executives driving artificial intelligence and data strategies across the region. Designed for CDOs, Heads of Data, and AI and innovation leaders, this full-day event delivers high-impact insights and actionable strategies focused on organizations’ top priorities: scaling AI adoption, ensuring data quality and governance, and navigating complex digital regulation and readiness.

IDC’s analysts and industry experts will guide you on how to build future-ready data architectures, operationalize AI responsibly, and drive measurable business impact. Through keynote sessions, panels, and collaborative discussions, this event provides Europe’s leaders with the tools and frameworks to transform AI and data into a foundation for innovation, resilience, and growth.

[Why Attend?](https://event.idc.com/event/ai-data-summit-san-francisco/why-attend/) [KEY THEMES](https://event.idc.com/event/ai-data-summit-san-francisco/why-attend/#key-themes) [VIEW FULL AGENDA](https://event.idc.com/event/ai-data-summit-san-francisco/agenda/)

## Expert Perspectives

Hear from global thought leaders, visionary CIOs, and celebrity speakers redefining technology, leadership, and innovation across the region.

**10:10 am**

#### Agentic AI at Scale: Accelerating Innovation While Managing Risk

Agentic AI is unlocking new levels of enterprise innovation by enabling autonomous decision-making and adaptive workflows at scale. Balancing this potential with robust risk management is essential for ensuring trust, compliance, and sustainable value as organizations operationalize agentic systems across critical functions.

**Alessandro Perilli | IDC**

Vice President, Enterprise AI Strategies

Read Bio

![Alessandro Perilli](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Alessandro-2.png)

![Alessandro Perilli](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Alessandro-2.png)

### Alessandro Perilli

IDC

Vice President, Enterprise AI Strategies

Alessandro Perilli is a Vice President leading the Agentic AI Platforms and Strategies research program. Alessandro’s core research coverage includes emerging AI technologies, global AI market trends, the state of enterprise AI, and sovereign AI.

Most recently, Alessandro founded Unstable Reality, an AI R&D lab in London, where he worked as Chief of Research, developing synthetic media generation solutions for creative studios, ad agencies, and large end-user organizations.

Among other projects, Alessandro published a weekly newsletter dedicated to tracking how AI is reshaping jobs, workforce productivity, and business operations.

Previously, Alessandro served as a senior leader at Red Hat, focused on business and product strategy. Across roles, Alessandro has also worked as an advisor to Fortune Global 2000 companies, helping IT decision makers translate emerging technology shifts into actionable and risk-informed strategies.

Throughout his career, Alessandro has often delivered keynotes at industry and vendor events, focusing on the state of the union and emerging trends in cybersecurity, virtualization, and cloud computing.

### Event Sessions

##### One Day Event 10:10 am

#### Agentic AI at Scale: Accelerating Innovation While Managing Risk

Agentic AI is unlocking new levels of enterprise innovation by enabling autonomous decision-making and adaptive workflows at scale. Balancing this potential with robust risk management is essential for ensuring trust, compliance, and sustainable value as organizations operationalize agentic systems across critical functions.

[Register Now](https://events.idc.com/d/55qjq1/4W?locale=en-US)  [Visit Agenda](https://events.idc.com/d/55qjq1/4W?locale=en-US/agenda)

As organizations accelerate investment in AI and data-driven transformation, many face a readiness gap: while 89% have revamped their data strategies to support Generative AI, only 26% have deployed these solutions at scale, and a mere 12% feel their infrastructure is ready for autonomous AI workflows. Further, the growth of unstructured data (projected at ~22% CAGR) underscores that quality and context across all data types is now mission critical.

​

These challenges demand that leaders transform data into a trusted strategic asset while embedding ethics, transparency, and resilience into AI initiatives.

## 2026 Prediction

By 2027, organizations that adopt tools and processes for AI evaluation and monitoring will have the confidence to deploy AI applications twice as fast as those that don’t.​

## Our Partners

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/partner-Dell-Technologies-Nvidia.png?w=300)

![Dell Technologies | Nvidia](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/partner-Dell-Technologies-Nvidia.png?w=300)

#### Dell Technologies | Nvidia

Dell Technologies and NVIDIA can help you leverage AI to drive innovation and achieve your business goals. The Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA is the industry’s first and only end-to-end enterprise AI solution, designed to speed AI adoption by delivering integrated Dell and NVIDIA capabilities to accelerate your AI-powered use cases, integrate your data and workflows, and enable you to design your own AI journey for repeatable, scalable outcomes.

[Privacy Policy](https://www.dell.com/en-us/lp/legal/policies-privacy)   [Website](https://www.dell.com/)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/syncari_logo_light-BG_RGB.png?w=300)

![Syncari](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/syncari_logo_light-BG_RGB.png?w=300)

#### Syncari

Syncari Agentic MDM™ is a unified, multi-domain master data platform that eliminates data drift across systems, domains, and architectures in real time. Powered by patented multi-directional sync, Syncari writes trusted data back to source systems as it changes, unifying master and transactional data enterprise-wide for operations, governance, and AI. With low-code deployment and fast time to value, Syncari delivers a consistent, governed foundation for automation and AI initiatives built on trusted 360° data.

[Privacy Policy](https://syncari.com/privacy-policy/)   [Website](https://syncari.com/)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Strategy_Brand_Mark_Orange_cmyk-1.png?w=300)

![Strategy](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Strategy_Brand_Mark_Orange_cmyk-1.png?w=300)

#### Strategy

We provide cloud-native, AI-powered enterprise analytics software to thousands of global customers, and leverage 35+ years of software expertise to explore innovation in Bitcoin applications. We believe the combination of our operating structure, Bitcoin strategy, and focus on technology innovation provides a unique opportunity for value creation.

We rebranded from MicroStrategy to Strategy in February 2025.

[Privacy Policy](https://www.strategy.com/legal/privacy-policy)   [Website](https://www.strategy.com/software)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/partner-SAP-e1761574109307.png?w=300)

![SAP](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/partner-SAP-e1761574109307.png?w=300)

#### SAP

As a global leader in enterprise applications and business AI, SAP stands at the nexus of business and technology. For over 50 years, organizations have trusted SAP to bring out their best by uniting business-critical operations spanning finance, procurement, HR, supply chain, and customer experience.

[Privacy Policy](https://www.sap.com/products/sme-business-software.html)   [Website](https://sap.com/)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/bluecat-logo-primary-positive-RGB-1.png?w=300)

![BlueCat Networks](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/bluecat-logo-primary-positive-RGB-1.png?w=300)

#### BlueCat Networks

**We’re helping organizations build the Intelligent Network of the Future!**

The outside world is changing, fast: more users, devices, and regions; soaring customer expectations; exploding cloud complexity; and rapidly evolving threats.

But your network is standing still. The core services connecting data centers, cloud, and branch networks make that change feel painful—manual, error-prone, high-risk, and hard to fix.

The faster you can adapt core services to meet new requirements, the faster your business can accelerate.

BlueCat provides a unified Intelligent NetOps suite making discovery, provisioning, intelligence, observability, automation and security easier, faster, and more thorough, streamlining complexity for a resilient, performant network that gets ahead of change.

BlueCat is known for helping organizations unify their DNS, DHCP, and IP address management (DDI) for unparalleled visibility and control.

[Privacy Policy](https://bluecatnetworks.com/privacy/)   [Website](https://bluecatnetworks.com/)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/GLN_logo-wordmark-Primary-11.jpg?w=300)

![Glean](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/GLN_logo-wordmark-Primary-11.jpg?w=300)

#### Glean

Glean is the **Work AI platform** that connects to and understands your company’s data, so employees can find answers, generate content, and automate work in one place. Built by former Google search engineers, Glean brings together enterprise search, an AI assistant, agents, and a system of context that works across the tools teams already use. Glean helps organizations reduce time spent searching for information, speed onboarding, improve support, and enable employees to work more effectively with AI.

[Privacy Policy](https://www.glean.com/privacy%20)   [Website](https://www.glean.com/)

[Become a Partner](https://www.idc.com/events/#form-events)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Picture4.png)

Enterprise use of AI is undergoing a rapid shift, marked not only by significant advances in generative, agentic, and composite AI technologies but also by a recalibration of how enterprises are approaching AI technology implementation for business value.

Sovereignty and control over AI infrastructure are becoming strategic priorities, especially in response to geopolitical and regulatory pressures. The rise of AI factories and AI-native businesses signals a future where automation, agility, and data-driven decision-making redefine operational efficiency and competitive advantage.

## Venue

**Address:**  40 O’Farrell Street, San Francisco, CA 94108

Convene 100 Stockton is located in the heart of San Francisco’s Union Square neighborhood.

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/venue-sfo2026.png)

### Convene 100 Stockton (Union Square)

The location celebrates the city’s illustrious weather phenomenon “Karl, the Fog”” with an etherial statement light fixture as well as reflective art and decor. The design is reminiscent of the surrounding landmarked architecture and coastal contemporary elements, including dramatic natural light, stonework, warm woods, and lush greenery. Convene 100 Stockton provides a white box space allowing for client and event branding opportunities, in-house catering with customization options and dining private to each event, in-room A/V technology supported by an on-site team, and dedicated hospitality resources.

The location is conveniently adjacent to several paid parking garages and is easily accessible via public transportation.

[Visit the site](https://convene.com/locations/san-francisco/100-stockton/) [Show on map](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Convene+100+Stockton/@37.786975,-122.4082789,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x80858088b8245d8b:0xd534314f5c067944!8m2!3d37.786975!4d-122.405704!16s%2Fg%2F11rwp0dztr?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI1MTEyMy4xIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D)

## Knowledge Hub

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Picture2.png)

#### FutureScape 2026: Unlocking innovation beyond productivity

Agentic AI is redefining value creation beyond efficiency, reshaping business models, industry boundaries, and competitive advantage.

 [Read more](https://www.idc.com/resource-center/blog/futurescape-2026-unlocking-innovation-beyond-productivity/)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Picture3-1.png)

#### AI-mediated buying journeys: How buyers decide who’s worth their time

As AI agents reshape B2B discovery, buyers filter vendors by proof, fit, and trust. Learn what signals actually move deals forward in AI-mediated journeys

 [Read more](https://www.idc.com/resource-center/blog/ai-mediated-buying-journeys-how-buyers-decide-whos-worth-their-time)

![](https://event.idc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Picture4-1.png)

#### Agentic AI is critical infrastructure

Agentic AI is becoming critical infrastructure. Learn why delegating authority to AI systems changes enterprise risk and what CIOs and CISOs must govern.

 [Read more](https://www.idc.com/resource-center/blog/agentic-ai-is-critical-infrastructure/)

## Join Us!

Don’t miss the AI & Data Summit San Francisco—Building Intelligence that Creates Real Value​.

## Why Attend

Join thousands of data leaders, engineers, scientists and architects to explore the convergence of data and AI and the future of data-intelligent apps and agents.

![Image 64: Discover the Latest Technologies](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmicrosites.databricks.com%2Fsites%2Fdefault%2Ffiles%2F2026-01%2Fdais24-photography-241%25201.jpg&w=3840&q=75)

#### learn

### Discover the Latest Technologies

Explore the latest advances in Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg™, Apache Spark™, MLflow, Unity Catalog, Lakeflow, Databricks Apps, Databricks SQL and Lakebase — alongside agentic AI systems, AI/BI and open source frameworks such as DSPy, LangChain, PyTorch, dbt and Trino.

![Image 65: Make Meaningful Connections](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmicrosites.databricks.com%2Fsites%2Fdefault%2Ffiles%2F2026-01%2Fdais24-photography-680_1_1.png&w=3840&q=75)

#### NETWORK

### Make Meaningful Connections

Interact with thousands of your peers from the data and AI community, and grow your professional network through social meetups, the Expo and exclusive event parties.

![Image 66: Access Training and Certification](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmicrosites.databricks.com%2Fsites%2Fdefault%2Ffiles%2F2026-01%2Fdais24-photography-294_1.png&w=3840&q=75)

#### LEVEL UP YOUR SKILLS

### Access Training and Certification

Sharpen your expertise with instructor-led, half-day training. Boost your credentials with our hands-on, lab-based format and get onsite certifications.

## Pricing

Government, military, education and nonprofit attendees are eligible for early-bird pricing beyond April 30.

[See all packages](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/pricing)

GENERAL ADMISSION

$1,895

STANDARD PRICE

MAY 1 -> JUNE 15

## FAQ

[See full list](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/faq)

* * *

### #### Who should attend Data + AI Summit?

+x

AI/machine learning engineers, data scientists, data engineers and practitioners, app developers, database administrators, business executives, IT decision-makers, product managers, entrepreneurs, investors and more.

### #### What is Data + AI Summit?

+x

The premier event for the global data, analytics and AI community. Summit brings together data practitioners, leaders and visionaries from more than 160 countries to explore the latest technologies and trends. Attendees can also participate in conference training and brand-new certification courses.

### #### Where will Data + AI Summit 2026 be held?

+x

The conference will take place at Moscone North, West and South (the address is 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103). Some events and activities may be a short walking distance from Moscone.

### #### Where should I stay for the event?

+x

We’ve partnered with several hotels in San Francisco offering special group rates for attendees. Book through the Data + AI Summit registration page to receive the event rate (subject to availability). See the list of recommended [hotels](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/travel), all conveniently located near Moscone Center. Due to the World Cup being hosted nearby, we recommend you book your hotel early.

### #### What is included in the full conference all-access pass?

+x

The full conference all-access pass will include keynotes, Expo, breakout sessions, networking events and virtual access.

![Image 67: Divider](https://www.databricks.com/dataaisummit/divider-mobile.svg)

Data + AI Summit couldn’t happen without our awesome sponsors. Interested in sponsoring? Reach out to our Sponsorship Management team to learn about available opportunities.

## Privacy Preference Center

*   ### Your Privacy

#### Your Privacy

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.

#### Opting out of sales, sharing, and targeted advertising

 Depending on your location, you may have the right to opt out of the “sale” or “sharing” of your personal information or the processing of your personal information for purposes of online “targeted advertising.” You can opt out based on cookies and similar identifiers by disabling optional cookies here. To opt out based on other identifiers (such as your email address), submit a request in our [Privacy Request Center](https://privacypreferences.databricks.com/). 

[More information](https://www.databricks.com/legal/cookienotice)

#### Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They assist with essential site functionality such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will no longer work.

#### Performance Cookies

- [x] Performance Cookies 

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.

#### Functional Cookies

- [x] Functional Cookies 

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

#### Targeting Cookies

- [x] Targeting Cookies 

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertisements on other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

#### TOTHR

## AIM-2026

Welcome to the Third International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIM-2026) April 27-29, 2026 | San Francisco, CA, USA  
We are pleased to invite you to the **Third International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIM-2026)**, taking place from **April 27 to 29, 2026** at San Francisco, USA. AIM Conference is a premier global gathering that brings together the brightest minds in AI research, development, and application. As we navigate a world increasingly shaped by intelligent systems, this conference serves as a dynamic platform for collaboration, knowledge exchange, and future-driven innovation.

## Tailored Features for Your Events

##### Conference Highlights

AIM-2026 serves as a premier platform for sharing the latest research, innovations, and methodologies in Artificial Intelligence. The conference brings together leading academics, researchers, and industry professionals to exchange knowledge, share experiences, and foster collaboration across all areas of AI, Machine Learning, and Data Science.

[Read More](registration_form)

##### Investment Opportunities in AI and Robotics

The AIM-2026 Conference provides a unique platform for innovators and emerging companies to showcase their AI and Machine Learning technologies to industry leaders, investors, and potential partners.The conference brings together leading academics, researchers, and industry professionals to exchange knowledge, share experiences, and foster collaboration across all areas of AI, Machine Learning, and Data Science.

[Read More](registration_form)

##### Why to Attend?

AIM Conference offers a unique platform to explore the latest innovations and emerging trends in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Robotics bringing together cutting-edge research, real-world applications, and global expertise.

[Read More](registration_form)

##### Themes & Focus Areas

The conference features keynote sessions, panel discussions, and technical workshops across a wide range of cutting-edge topics, including:

* Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
* Robotics and Neural Networks
* Generative AI and AI Applications
* Human-AI Collaboration and Explainable AI

[Read More](registration_form)

##### Program Overview

The three-day AIM-2026 conference will feature a dynamic program, including plenary talks, keynote speeches, interactive sessions, academic discussions, oral and poster presentations, technical workshops, and networking events. For any specific questions or further assistance related to the conference, please feel free to contact us at: [aim@uniscigroup.org](mailto:aim@uniscigroup.org)

## Forge the future of AI

**Pioneering thinkers, assemble**

Book your ticket and prepare to take your seat alongside the leading minds in AI at the only global gathering focused on driving real, meaningful change. This is where the future of AI is decided. Where policy-makers, international delegations and AI pioneers hold groundbreaking discussions and form actionable strategies that will shape our collective future. Add your voice to the debate and join our movement championing AI for good.

[BUY TICKETS](https://usa.worldsummit.ai/book-world-summit-ai-usa?hsLang=en)

C-Suite Attendance

## Why World Summit AI USA?

### True AI Innovators

We’ve been pushing boundaries in the AI sphere for over a decade and have the backing of the sector’s most pioneering minds.

### Global brain trust

Our 300,000 strong community from 160+ countries is a world-leading source of AI knowledge and expertise.

### International insights

We have access to the most groundbreaking insights from the world’s most influential AI markets, from China to Saudi Arabia.

### Real-world impact

We don’t just focus on the theoretical, we’re all about showcasing AI that’s changing the game RIGHT NOW.

### Tech for good

Our community isn't just focused on building smarter machines; together, we’re committed to crafting a better world through tech.

## Here's a taste of what awaits you

## Meet our speakers

Hear from the brains behind some of the most groundbreaking advancements in AI.

## Key players, get ready

WSAI USA brings the brightest minds in the world of AI together in one room to discuss and plan how to use tech to shape a more uplifting future.  
   
So when you book your ticket, you’ll be joining a host of other inspired minds like C-suite visionaries, pioneering coders, innovative founders and the best CTOs, data scientists, engineers and academics in the business.

## Here's 6 reasons why wsai usa is simply too good to miss

[BOOK TICKETS](https://usa.worldsummit.ai/book-world-summit-ai-usa?hsLang=en)

## Become one of our partners

## World Summit AI Global Summit Series

### 6-10 October 2025 Amsterdam, Netherlands

World AI Week is the planet’s only week dedicated to the global AI ecosystem, a bustling, thriving series of 40+ cutting-edge business, science, tech and networking gatherings showcasing how AI is transforming business and society, with a focus on automation, creativity, diversity, innovation, responsibility, and optimisation.

[LEARN MORE](https://worldaiweek.ai/)

### 8-9 October 2025 Amsterdam, Netherlands

Seen by tech leaders as the platform to launch their latest AI products and services and regarded as the world leading startup and investor network, WSAI gathers the global AI ecosystem of Enterprise, Big Tech, Startups, Investors, Science and Academia to set the global AI agenda, every October in Amsterdam.

[LEARN MORE](https://worldsummit.ai/)

### 9-10 October 2025 Doha, Qatar

Hosted under the official patronage of the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology, State of Qatar, World Summit AI Qatar focuses on the power of artificial intelligence to transform regions and communities, contributing to the collective advancement of AI on a global scale.

[LEARN MORE](https://qatar.worldsummit.ai/)

## See what our attendees say

"Very proud to be the Headline & Lead Consulting Partner of WSAI since 2017. As Accenture Applied Intelligence we strongly believe that partnering with WSAI, as the leading event in the world for the whole AI ecosystem, we can lead the way in transforming businesses across the globe with intelligent technology and human ingenuity. WSAI gives us the excellent opportunity to lead the conversation on responsible AI, and show and tell our key stakeholders how we are already applying AI in many ways."

###### M&C Manager

Accenture The Netherlands

"Visionary content, imaginative production, and an engaged audience all in a fantastic location combined to make World Summit AI a top-flight AI event."

###### Marketing Director

"The folks from WSAI had been a true partner helping from the first idea of the workshop all the way to running it. The spirit and the diversity of the attendees from more than 100 countries was just fantastic."

###### Global Head of Artificial Intelligence

“The setup was seamless, and I appreciated the attention to detail in ensuring everything ran smoothly. The communication from the team was excellent throughout the summit, from pre-summit coordination to on-site support. I always felt well-informed and taken care of, which made the experience much more enjoyable and productive.”

![SF AI Engineers Tech Talk: July 2026](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/9/b/a/6/600_532719846.jpeg)

# SF AI Engineers Tech Talk: July 2026

Thursday, 9 July 2026

01:00 UTC

House of AI

Hosted by

Fonzi

## About this event

The San Francisco AI Engineers Tech Talk series returns this July for an evening of real-world technical insights, practical demos, and networking with the Bay Area's AI engineering community. This monthly meetup brings together software developers, machine learning engineers, data scientists, and technical founders building at the application layer of AI.

### What to Expect

This isn't your typical tech meetup with vague pitches and surface-level content. The focus here is substance: engineers sharing actual projects they've shipped, the technical challenges they encountered, and the creative solutions they implemented. Whether you're deep into [Claude](/tools/claude) integration patterns, experimenting with [Cursor](/tools/cursor) for AI-assisted development, or building custom agents with [n8n](/tools/n8n) and [Supabase](/tools/supabase), you'll find kindred spirits tackling similar problems.

The evening features three 10-minute technical presentations followed by Q&A sessions where you can dig into implementation details. Presenters will be announced closer to the event date, but expect a mix of production deployment stories, novel architectural approaches, and lessons learned from working with LLMs in real applications.

### The Agenda

The event runs from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM at House of AI (40 Boardman Place). Arrive at 6:00 PM for networking over pizza, beer, and wine courtesy of Fonzi AI. Opening remarks kick off at 6:45 PM, followed by the three tech talks from 6:50 to 7:35 PM. The final 25 minutes are dedicated to connecting with speakers and fellow attendees.

### Who Should Attend

This meetup caters to technical practitioners: fullstack developers exploring LLM integration, machine learning engineers shipping production AI features, and anyone curious about the engineering side of AI applications. The conversations tend toward architecture patterns, API design, prompt engineering workflows, and deployment strategies rather than research or theory.

San Francisco AI Engineers is organized by [Fonzi](https://fonzi.ai/), a talent marketplace connecting elite engineers with top AI companies through their structured Match Day hiring process. They also run a parallel community in New York for those on the East Coast.

Find more AI events in [San Francisco](https://www.createwith.com/cities/san-francisco). [RSVP for this event](https://luma.com/jrs8v2ms) to secure your spot and join the conversation shaping how we build with AI.

### Stay in the loop

Weekly updates on the best AI events and community meetups.

### Topics

## More Automation Events

![AI School Mexico City Meetup: Building Income with AI](https://d2oi1rqwb0pj00.cloudfront.net/community-images/folderItem/common/nio_1775625941152_9b09d92b-b311-4eed-9add-593bb73c0bb9_GV_1.webp)

### AI School Mexico City Meetup: Building Income with AI

\*\*AI School is bringing its global community to [Mexico City](https://www.createwith.com/cities/mexico-city) for an intensive meetup focused on practical AI implementation and income generation.\*\* This isn't your typical networking event — it's a gathering of builders, makers, and entrepreneurs who are actively using AI to create automation systems, generate revenue, and build real-world leverage.
If you've been experimenting with AI tools, testing automation workflows, or simply observing from the sidelines, this meetup offers a crucial opportunity to connect with people who have already made the leap from learning to earning. The AI School Mexico Meetup brings together individuals who understand that AI is not just a theoretical playground but a practical toolkit for business transformation.
## What to Expect
This event deliberately avoids the corporate presentation format in favor of genuine, unfiltered conversations about what actually works. You'll gain access to behind-the-scenes insights from people building AI-powered businesses, automating workflows, and creating new income streams. The focus is on actionable strategies, real implementation challenges, and proven approaches rather than theoretical possibilities.
The meetup format encourages direct interaction with fellow builders who are navigating similar challenges. Whether you're automating client work, building AI agents, or exploring no-code AI solutions, you'll find others working on comparable problems and willing to share what they've learned through hands-on experience.
## Who Should Attend
This event is designed for action-takers: freelancers using AI to scale their services, entrepreneurs building AI-powered products, professionals automating their workflows, and anyone serious about turning AI skills into tangible business outcomes. The AI School community has over 22,000 members worldwide, and this Mexico City chapter represents an opportunity to tap into that knowledge base in person.
Expect conversations about automation tools, revenue generation strategies, client acquisition, and the practical realities of building with AI in 2026. The no-fluff approach means you'll spend your time discussing real implementations, sharing actual results, and forming connections with people who can directly impact your AI journey.
## Community Access
Attending this meetup also connects you to the broader AI School for Business community, which includes access to exclusive content, ongoing

![AI and Deep Learning Meetup Da Nang](https://secure.meetupstatic.com/photos/event/4/0/4/600_522361028.jpeg)

### AI and Deep Learning Meetup Da Nang

Looking to connect with [Da Nang](https://www.createwith.com/cities/da-nang)'s AI community? This weekly Sunday morning meetup brings together AI enthusiasts, developers, data scientists, hobbyists, and creatives for informal knowledge sharing and hands-on exploration of artificial intelligence and deep learning.
## What to Expect
This is an open, collaborative gathering where participants share projects, discuss the latest AI trends, and learn from each other's experiences. Whether you're deep into LLM development, experimenting with AI-powered art and design, or just getting started with machine learning, you'll find a welcoming community ready to exchange ideas and insights.
The format is deliberately flexible and community-driven. Sessions typically include:
- \*\*Project demos and show-and-tell\*\* — bring your laptop and showcase what you're building
- \*\*Discussions on the latest AI developments\*\* — from new model releases to breakthrough techniques
- \*\*Hands-on workshops\*\* — community members regularly volunteer to lead short practical sessions on AI tools and frameworks
- \*\*Peer learning and troubleshooting\*\* — get feedback on your projects and help others with theirs
For week-specific agendas and detailed announcements about talks, demos, or special topics, the organizers maintain an active [Telegram group](https://t.me/+7Wwry4WRoZBlNTEx) where you can stay updated on what each session will cover.
## Who Should Attend
This meetup welcomes anyone interested in AI and deep learning, regardless of experience level:
- Software developers exploring AI integration
- Data scientists working on machine learning projects
- Researchers experimenting with deep learning techniques
- Artists and designers using AI in creative workflows
- Hobbyists curious about artificial intelligence
- Anyone building with large language models
The relaxed, informal atmosphere makes it easy to ask questions, share challenges, and connect with others on similar learning journeys.
## Practical Details
The meetup takes place every Sunday from 11:00 AM to 1:00 PM at Webe Coffee, conveniently located at 14-16 Nguyễn Hữu Thông in the An Hải area of Sơn Trà district. The venue provides a comfortable setting for both technical discussions and casual networking over coffee.
Hosted by AI Fusion Labs, these weekly sessions have become a cornerstone of Da Nang's growing tech community, offering consistent opportunities to stay current with AI developments while building meaningfu

![AgentCamp - Ipoh](https://globalai.community/media/l01mitdz/10e74b77031b495fb6d67e645ff46de9.png?width=800&height=800&v=1dc6a7b63089220)

### AgentCamp - Ipoh

Join AgentCamp Ipoh for a free community-focused session exploring AI concepts in basic education and hands-on automation with [n8n](/tools/n8n). Organised by Global AI Ipoh, this event brings together learners, educators, and AI enthusiasts in [Malaysia's creative tin-mining heritage city](https://globalai.community/chapters/ipoh/) for an evening of practical learning and community connection.
## What You'll Learn
This session bridges foundational AI education with practical automation skills. The organisers have published several e-books on Amazon specifically focused on introducing AI concepts within basic education, and this event extends that mission into a hands-on format. You'll gain practical experience with AI tools across different platforms, with a particular focus on building workflows and automations using [n8n](/tools/n8n) — a powerful workflow automation tool that connects AI services with everyday applications.
## Who Should Attend
This event welcomes anyone interested in understanding how AI can be applied in educational contexts or everyday automation:
- \*\*Educators and trainers\*\* looking to integrate AI concepts into their teaching
- \*\*Students and learners\*\* exploring AI fundamentals and practical applications
- \*\*Automation enthusiasts\*\* wanting hands-on experience with [n8n](/tools/n8n)
- \*\*Community builders\*\* interested in connecting with the Global AI Ipoh chapter
- \*\*Complete beginners\*\* — no prior AI experience required
## Event Format
The one-hour session combines conceptual learning with practical demonstration, giving you both the foundational understanding and hands-on experience needed to start building with AI tools. This is an interactive session where you'll see real workflows in action and have opportunities to ask questions about implementing automation in your own context.
## Global AI Community
AgentCamp Ipoh is part of the worldwide AgentCamp series run by the Global AI Community, connecting local chapters across the globe in a shared mission to make AI education accessible and practical. The Global AI Ipoh chapter regularly publishes learning resources and hosts events designed to demystify AI for learners at all levels.
## Join the Conversation
Share your experience using #AgentCamp and #GlobalAICommunity, and tag [@GlobAICommunity](https://twitter.com/GlobAICommunity) on X or [Global AI Community](https://www.linkedin.com/company/global-ai-community) on LinkedIn to connect with participants from AgentCa

### AI Agent Development for Business - NextGen Growth

## AI Agent Development for Business — NextGen Growth at Automation Revolution
NextGen Growth presents a focused look at intelligent automation as part of Scotland’s largest automation conference. The event, running 4–6 May 2026 in Glasgow, brings together 2,000+ attendees to explore RPA, test and workflow automation, no-code platforms, and AI-powered automation in business processes. Tickets start from £189.
### What this event covers
- A comprehensive look at automation across the enterprise, including ROI measurement and optimisation.
- Real-world RPA implementation case studies, hands-on workshops for test automation frameworks, and demonstrations of no-code automation platforms.
- AI-powered automation tools and the future of automated business processes.
- Networking opportunities, vendor demonstrations, and ethics discussions on automation.
### Day 1 highlights (example of schedule)
- 09:00 Registration & Coffee
- 10:00 Keynote: The Automation-First Enterprise
- 12:00 Networking Lunch
- 13:30 Technical Workshops
- 16:00 Vendor Demonstrations
- 17:30 Panel: Automation Ethics
- 19:00 Scottish Whisky Tasting
### Keynote speakers

![AgentCon San Francisco: Call for Speakers](https://sessionize.com/image/3885-1140o400o3-Rda3opzdCYztvZnV7fCeNh.png)

### AgentCon San Francisco: Call for Speakers

AgentCon San Francisco is a developer-focused AI agents conference in Silicon Valley on May 4, 2026, featuring talks, hands-on workshops, and live demos. Learn how to build and integrate AI agents in real-world projects, with two tracks (Technical Sessions and Hands-on Workshops), plus networking.
What to expect:
- An immersive, one-day conference dedicated to practical AI agent development, aimed at developers, data scientists, researchers, and startup builders.
- Two tracks:
- Technical Sessions: 25–45 minute talks exploring architecture, implementation, and case studies of AI agents.
- Hands-on Workshop Track: 60–90 minute interactive sessions for deeper coding and live experimentation.
- A keynote and dedicated community networking sessions to connect with peers, mentors, and potential collaborators.
Key topics you’ll see and explore:
- Building AI Agents using frameworks and toolchains (for example, Semantic Kernel, LangChain, Autogen, CrewAI) and how they fit into real product workflows
- Integrating AI Agents into products, services, and business processes
- Multi-agent collaboration, orchestration patterns, and system design for scalable autonomous agents
- Prompt engineering, LLM optimization, evaluation, and usability considerations
- Responsible AI, ethics, governance, and security considerations for agent-based systems
- Developer tooling, SDKs, cloud integrations, observability, and monitoring for AI agents
- Hands-on demos, tutorials, and live coding to translate theory into runnable prototypes
Audience and goals:
- Targeted at developers, engineers, data scientists, architects, startup founders, researchers, and students who want practical, hands-on experience with agent-powered systems.
- Sessions should be educational, original, and aligned with the community-driven focus of AgentCon.
- Submissions welcome from seasoned professionals and first-time speakers alike.
Call for speakers details:
- Call opens at 12:00 AM and closes at 11:59 PM, with a submission window through March 15, 2026.
- Location: Computer Museum, Silicon Valley, San Francisco, California, United States.
- Website: https://globalai.community/chapters/san-francisco/events/agentcon-san-francisco/
- The event is part of the Global AI Community’s AgentCon series, inviting you to contribute sessions that educate, inspire, and empower developers building with AI agents.
How to participate:
- Visit the Event page and submit your talk proposal.
- Login or create an accou

![BUas to host Young Talents International Conference 2026](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E3DAQF3JGSXyEFDfA/image-scale_191_1128/B4EZb3QsWIGcAc-/0/1747905071256/bredauniversityas_cover?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=gHC_yttIAUHCe97OPtEFnuM4Uc7dRv-UUoYSOXYh__A)

### BUas to host Young Talents International Conference 2026

Breda University of Applied Sciences is bringing together the brightest young minds in AI research for the \*\*Young Talents International Conference (YTIC) 2026\*\*, running from 4–8 May in [Breda](https://www.createwith.com/cities/breda). This pan-European gathering will unite students and researchers from eight universities across the continent for an intensive exploration of artificial intelligence's transformative potential.
## What to Expect
YTIC 2026 offers a comprehensive programme designed to showcase cutting-edge research and foster collaboration among emerging AI talents. The conference features:
- \*\*Poster presentations\*\* where students can present their research and engage in direct dialogue with peers and experts
- \*\*Hands-on workshops\*\* providing practical experience with AI tools and methodologies
- \*\*Inspiring talks\*\* from researchers and practitioners covering three core themes:
- \*\*Generative AI\*\*: Exploring creative applications and the latest developments in AI-generated content
- \*\*Robotics\*\*: Examining how AI is revolutionising autonomous systems and human-machine interaction
- \*\*Responsible AI\*\*: Addressing the ethical implications, bias mitigation, and sustainable development of AI technologies
## Who Should Attend
This conference is tailored for undergraduate and graduate students actively engaged in AI research, as well as early-career researchers looking to connect with the European AI research community. Whether you're working on machine learning algorithms, developing AI applications, or investigating the societal impact of artificial intelligence, YTIC 2026 provides an ideal platform to share your work and gain fresh perspectives.
## Why YTIC Matters
The Young Talents International Conference represents more than just an academic gathering — it's a unique opportunity to build lasting connections across eight European universities, learn from diverse research approaches, and contribute to the conversation shaping AI's future. The multi-day format allows for deep engagement with topics and meaningful networking that extends beyond traditional one-day events.
Hosted by Breda University of Applied Sciences, known for its commitment to creating meaningful experiences and applied research, the conference benefits from the university's expertise in data science and AI education. # 17 Must-Attend Tech Events in San Francisco (2026 Calendar)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-60.jpeg "image")
![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-56.jpeg)

Need help picking the best tech events in San Francisco for your 2026 calendar? Many people face this challenge. The United States will host more than 277 events, and choosing where to invest your time and money can be daunting.

My research into San Francisco’s technology events has been extensive. I focused on the most influential gatherings coming up next year. Research shows that 80% of professionals believe face-to-face events are the best way to explore new tech solutions. This makes picking the right conferences vital to remain competitive.

San Francisco remains the hub of technological breakthroughs. The city hosts massive conferences that attract over 35,000 global leaders and specialized masterclasses for tech professionals. The city has 20 tech conferences scheduled, so you need a clear plan to pick events that match your goals.

We selected 17 must-attend tech events to simplify your planning. These range from the iconic Dreamforce to specialized gatherings like HealthTech Week. These conferences create opportunities for deal-making, knowledge sharing, and career advancement in 2026.

## [**Dreamforce 2026**](https://www.salesforce.com/dreamforce/)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-54.jpeg)

Image Source: [Salesforce](https://www.salesforce.com)

Dreamforce represents the ultimate tech gathering in San Francisco that draws business leaders and state-of-the-art thinkers from around the world. The 2026 edition builds on what Salesforce calls the “agentic revolution” through three days of cutting-edge technology and business transformation.

### **Dreamforce 2026 Overview**

The flagship global conference by Salesforce will take place from September 15-17 in San Francisco. This premier event brings together business leaders, developers, administrators, and partners to showcase the latest advances in customer relationship management, artificial intelligence, and enterprise cloud technology. Attendees can expect immersive keynotes, hands-on learning sessions, product innovations, and networking opportunities that help organizations build stronger customer connections.

### **Dreamforce 2026 Key Highlights**

Several compelling elements make this one of the most anticipated technology events in San Francisco:

### **Dreamforce 2026 Target Audience**

Dreamforce welcomes professionals from every corner of the Salesforce ecosystem. Administrators, developers, architects, beginners, and experienced Trailblazers will find value in the sessions. Previous years saw over 40,000 in-person attendees and 200,000 online registrants, creating a community that spans industries and roles.

### **Dreamforce 2026 Pricing**

Previous conferences set ticket prices at around $2,000. Early bird registrants can save 20% on their tickets. The total cost, including flights and accommodation, typically runs between $5,000-$7,000.

### **Dreamforce 2026 Location & Venue**

San Francisco’s Moscone Center will host the event. Salesforce creates “Dreampark” – a specially designed space connecting Moscone North and South, making the venue perfect for this massive gathering.

## [**TechCrunch Disrupt 2026**](https://techcrunch.com/events/tc-disrupt-2026/)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-49.jpeg)

Image Source: [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com)

TechCrunch Disrupt stands as the leading event for startup enthusiasts in Silicon Valley. The three-day conference runs from October 13-15, 2026, and has become the must-attend event for startups at every growth stage.

### **TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Overview**

The 2026 edition brings the global startup ecosystem together for three days of powerful programming, groundbreaking ideas, and practical learning. Founders, investors, and innovators come together to shape technology’s future and entrepreneurship at this flagship event. More than 10,000 founders, operators, VCs, and visionaries attended previous events, creating an unmatched environment where ideas become companies and connections turn into opportunities.

### **TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Key Highlights**

The event stands out from other San Francisco tech events with these distinctive components:

### **TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Target Audience**

Disrupt serves entrepreneurs at every level—from those with revolutionary ideas to established startups ready to scale. The event draws investors looking for opportunities, corporate innovators, and anyone who wants to learn about technology’s future. Notable past speakers included Roelof Botha, Mary Barra, Vinod Khosla, and Serena Williams.

### **TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Pricing**

The exact 2026 pricing remains to be announced, but past events give a good indication. Early bird tickets usually save attendees USD 100. Several ticket tiers are available, and Expo+ passes typically start at USD 75. These passes give access to exhibition areas, pitch sessions, and some networking opportunities.

### **TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Location & Venue**

San Francisco, California will host the event. This location puts attendees right in the global tech ecosystem’s heart, where networking often leads to partnerships and funding opportunities.

## [**MongoDB.local San Francisco**](https://www.mongodb.com/events/mongodb-local/san-francisco)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-51.jpeg)

Image Source: [MongoDB](https://www.mongodb.com)

### **MongoDB.local Overview**

MongoDB.local San Francisco 2026 brings the MongoDB community together for a packed day of breakout sessions, announcements, keynotes, and customer stories. The event runs from 8:30 A.M. to 6:00 P.M. PT. Attendees get hands-on learning and direct access to MongoDB experts. The smaller size creates a more intimate setting than larger conferences, letting you take a closer look at specific database technologies and implementation strategies. This event is part of MongoDB’s worldwide local events happening throughout 2026.

### **MongoDB.local Key Highlights**

San Francisco’s tech scene will host many events, but MongoDB.local stands out with these features:

### **MongoDB.local Target Audience**

Developers, architects, IT professionals, and DevOps engineers who work with or learn MongoDB are the core audience. The event works great for both MongoDB veterans and newcomers who want to boost their database skills and connect with others in the field.

### **MongoDB.local Pricing**

A general admission pass costs $100.00 and includes full access to all content, MongoDB experts, plus food and drinks throughout the day. This is a big deal as it means that attendees get exceptional value compared to other San Francisco tech events. Early birds can save 50% using promo codes like “WEB50”.

### **MongoDB.local Location & Venue**

The Midway at 900 Marin St, San Francisco, CA 94124 will host the event. The venue offers plenty of space for all educational and networking activities planned for the day.

### **AI DevSummit Target Audience**

The event welcomes a variety of technical professionals, especially when you have AI managers, executives, software engineers, and data scientists. Both newcomers and experienced professionals will find value here – whether they need an introduction to AI or want a detailed view of emerging AI technologies. ### **AI DevSummit Location & Venue**

The masterclass shows teams how to develop large enterprise systems while focusing on code quality through structure.

### **Product-Led Summit Location & Venue**

Hyatt Regency San Francisco Airport in Burlingame serves as the venue. The location provides easy access to San Francisco and Silicon Valley campuses.

## [**Step SF 2026**](https://sf.stepconference.com/)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-61.jpeg)

Image Source: [Step SF](https://sf.stepconference.com)

Tech founders and AI enthusiasts won’t want to miss Step SF 2026. This dynamic AI and tech festival returns to San Francisco on August 20-21, marking its third successful year.

### **Step SF Overview**

This two-day AI and tech startup festival features startup showcases, expo areas, and connects founders with potential investors. The event’s debut was a soaring win with 750 attendees, 72 showcasing startups, 100+ VCs and investors, and 40 speakers. Step SF, now 3 years old, creates an electric atmosphere full of creative energy and future-focused networking.

### **Step SF Key Features**

The event has three main elements:

### **Step SF Target Audience**

The event brings together founders, investors, and tech enthusiasts who want advanced conversations and networking opportunities.

### **Step SF Pricing**

You can choose from three ticket types: Master pass ($279), Scholarship ticket ($75), and Startup demo table ($525).

### **Step SF Location & Venue**

The Midway in San Francisco serves as the main hub for conference activities and the closing party. You’ll find additional events at other venues – SVB Offices hosts pitch competitions while Barbarossa Lounge welcomes networkers.

## [**NEARCON**](https://nearcon.org/)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-62.jpeg)

Image Source: [IQ.wiki](https://iq.wiki)

Blockchain enthusiasts will meet at NEARCON 2026, where AI meets decentralized technology at one of the most innovative tech events in San Francisco next year.

### **NEARCON Overview**

NEARCON returns after a two-year hiatus on February 23-24, 2026. The event moves from Lisbon to San Francisco. “The Internet Wants to Think” serves as the event’s theme and emphasizes NEAR Protocol’s focus on blending AI with blockchain technology. The Bay Area location places the conference at the heart of the AI revolution. Participants will explore state-of-the-art concepts including user-owned AI and AI agents’ capabilities to transact on-chain.

### **NEARCON Key Highlights**

Attendees can expect visionary keynotes from global AI and open technology pioneers. The program combines live agent demonstrations with hands-on workshops. Deep discussions about privacy’s role in user-owned AI at scale will take place. The event features debates between industry leaders about adoption, ethics, and billion-dollar use cases.

### **NEARCON Target Audience**

Previous NEARCON attracted 3,000-5,000 global participants, including developers, entrepreneurs, investors, and Web3 enthusiasts. The 2026 edition adopts a more curated, exclusive format. Attendance requires an invitation through an application process.

### **NEARCON Pricing**

Applications for speakers and attendees remain open. Prospective participants must apply for an invitation to register.

### **NEARCON Location & Venue**

Fort Mason Center in San Francisco, California will host the conference.

## [**BSidesSF 2026**](https://bsidessf.org/)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-48.jpeg)

Image Source: [bsidessf.org](https://bsidessf.org)

Security professionals looking for cybersecurity events in San Francisco will love BSidesSF 2026. This event promises an exceptional community experience with its musical theme.

### **BSidesSF Overview**

BSidesSF 2026 will run March 21-22 at City View at the Metreon. This non-profit event helps advance information security knowledge through open forums where practitioners can discuss and share ideas. The conference organizers are currently planning the event to encourage education and collaboration among information technologists.

### **BSidesSF Key Highlights**

The 2026 edition explains:

### **BSidesSF Target Audience**

The event brings together security professionals from hands-on engineers to business leaders and executive decision makers. Participants don’t just attend – they actively shape the conference experience.

### **BSidesSF Pricing**

You can register in early January 2026. Previous events cost around $70.

### **BSidesSF Location & Venue**

City View at Metreon hosts the conference at 135 4th St in downtown San Francisco. The venue combines presentation spaces with interactive villages throughout the two-day event.

## [**AI Dev 26 x SF**](https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/)

![](https://withjoy.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/image-59.jpeg)

Image Source: [AI Developer Conference](https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai)

AI developers who want to shape artificial intelligence’s future should check out AI Dev 26 x SF. Andrew Ng’s  will host this event at Pier 48 in San Francisco.[DeepLearning.AI](http://deeplearning.ai)

### **AI Dev 26 Overview**

This major two-day event (April 28-29, 2026) will bring together more than 3,000 developers for an immersive technical conference. Last year’s New York event was a soaring win with 1,200 attendees. The West Coast edition promises better hands-on learning opportunities, real-life insights, and innovative technology demonstrations.

### **AI Dev 26 Key Highlights**

Industry leaders including Andrew Ng will deliver keynotes at this conference, which features technical workshops and state-of-the-art AI demonstrations. Main topics include:

### **AI Dev 26 Target Audience**

AI application developers, software engineers, data scientists, and technical product managers will find value in this event.

### **AI Dev 26 Pricing**

Tickets come in three tiers: Early Bird ($499), Regular ($799), and Last Chance ($1,299). Each package includes full access to sessions, workshops, demo areas, meals and refreshments.

### **AI Dev 26 Location & Venue**

Pier 48 in San Francisco will host the conference. Attendees can book rooms at partner hotels with special rates.

## **Conclusion**

San Francisco remains the tech industry’s beating heart in 2026. The city hosts an impressive lineup of events for tech professionals in any discipline. These 17 selected events represent the best opportunities that provide maximum value whatever your tech interests.

These gatherings deliver more than passive learning. Over 40,000 attendees make Dreamforce a networking powerhouse. Specialized events like MongoDB.local give database professionals deep technical insights. On top of that, it covers emerging fields through AI Dev 26 and NEARCON, where AI and blockchain breakthroughs take center stage.

The events’ diversity makes them valuable. TechCrunch Disrupt welcomes startup founders seeking investment. BSidesSF helps security professionals learn about latest threats. The CPO Summit supports product leaders in strategy refinement. San Francisco’s 2026 calendar has something tailored for everyone.

Smart event selection needs strategic planning. Your professional goals, budget limits, and knowledge gaps should guide your choices. Early registration brings big savings – many events offer 20-50% discounts for early birds.

Time and money invested in these conferences pay off through bigger networks, market insights, and skill growth that could take years to build otherwise. These events help you gage industry trends and keep your skills relevant in an evolving digital world.

Your 2026 tech calendar needs careful planning. These 17 events are San Francisco’s best opportunities to connect, learn, and grow professionally. While attending all might be impossible, picking even a few aligned events will boost your professional trip throughout the year.

# GenAI Summit SF 2026

GenAI Summit SF 2026

GenAI Summit SF 2026

🚀 Build the Next Intelligence Layer at GenAI Summit 2026

📅 July 18–19, 2026  
📍 Palace of Fine Arts, San Francisco  
🌐 Hosted by GPTDAO — Silicon Valley’s leading GenAI Community

For partnership, please visit here.

Co-host by Microsoft, Generative.AI, Stanford Entrepreneurs, Stanford Founders

## 🔮 The Future Isn’t Just AI — It’s Autonomous Intelligence

Over the past year, something fundamental changed.

AI is no longer just a tool.  
It’s becoming a system.

From copilots → to agents  
From models → to execution  
From assistance → to autonomy [...] We are entering the OpenClaw era —  
where AI doesn’t just generate answers, but takes action, runs workflows, and collaborates like a digital operator.

GenAI Summit 2026 is where this new paradigm comes alive.

## 🌉 Where Intelligence Meets the World

This year, we gather at one of the most iconic venues in the world:

Palace of Fine Arts, San Francisco

San Francisco is the global epicenter of AI.  
And the Palace of Fine Arts is its most elegant, timeless landmark.

When frontier technology meets classical architecture,  
it signals something deeper:

The next era of intelligence is not just technical — it’s cultural.

## 🌍 Not a Conference — A Living Intelligence System

With 10,000+ attendees, 300+ startups, and the world’s top AI minds in one place,  
this is not just an event. [...] It’s a live intelligence network.

You’re not just attending —  
you’re stepping inside a system where ideas, capital, and execution converge in real time.

## 💡 Why Attend GenAI Summit 2026?

🤖 Witness the Rise of OpenClaw

From “AI assists you” → to “AI executes for you”

Explore:

🚀 Meet the Builders of the Next Paradigm

Connect with leaders from:

OpenAI · Google · Meta · Microsoft · Tesla · Stanford · a16z · Sequoia · and more

Not just talks —  
direct access to how they think and build

🔬 Explore AI in Production

No fluff. No demos-for-show.

Real systems, already deployed:

🎤 From Idea to Execution

See what actually works:

This is where signal replaces noise.

🌐 A Global Intelligence Network

Attendees from 30+ countries

Founders · Investors · Engineers · Researchers

This year, people are asking:

# The AI Conference in San Francisco 2026

## September 30 - October 01

[« All Events](https://graphwise.ai/events/)

### **Meet Graphwise at The AI Conference 2026**

Graphwise is excited to participate at The AI Conference 2026, taking place September 30 – October 1 in San Francisco.

The AI Conference brings together thousands of AI engineers, architects, and business leaders to explore real-world applications of artificial intelligence. With a deeply technical audience and major industry players in attendance, it is one of the key events for teams building and scaling AI solutions.

Graphwise will be on-site throughout the event. Stop by our booth to meet the team, see what we are building, or talk through your AI and data challenges. You are also welcome to drop by just to say hello. We will also be delivering a speaking session during the conference. We will share more details about the session topic and our booth location closer to the event.

### **Let’s Connect**

If you plan to attend The AI Conference and would like to connect ahead of time, we would love to hear from you. If you will not be there but still want to start a conversation, that works too.

Get in touch: [info@graphwise.ai](mailto:info@graphwise.ai)

See you in San Francisco this fall!

![](https://graphwise.ai/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Banner-XL-TAIC-Graphwise-2000x1000-1.png)

Graphwise brings confidence to search, analytics, and AI. Our platform is built for enterprises where **precision is a must or complexity is high**. We transform disparate data silos into a trusted enterprise knowledge graph, providing a governed layer of context for consistent, reliable AI applications. At Graphwise, we turn enterprise data from a liability into an asset. We build the **“trusted semantic backbone”** that connects disconnected data silos and integrates your proprietary domain knowledge into your AI. This allows you to govern your AI , boost model accuracy , and drive a positive ROI.

Incredibly excited to announce our annual conference, Zero Click by Profound 2026, kicks off in San Francisco on April 8, then returns to our home base in New York on June 11.
- The world’s leading conference on AI Marketing and AI Search.
- Leaders from brands like Reddit, Inc., Figma, Gamma, Expedia, Ramp, PartnerStack, U.S. Bank and G2. More headliners dropping soon.
You won't want to miss this one.

📍New York: June 11

- Leaders from brands like [Reddit, Inc.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/reddit-com?trk=public_post-text), [Figma](https://www.linkedin.com/company/figma?trk=public_post-text), [Gamma](https://www.linkedin.com/company/gamma-app?trk=public_post-text), [Expedia](https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/expedia/?trk=public_post-text), [Ramp](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ramp?trk=public_post-text), [PartnerStack](https://ca.linkedin.com/company/partnerstack?trk=public_post-text), [U.S. Bank](https://www.linkedin.com/company/us-bank?trk=public_post-text) and [G2](https://www.linkedin.com/company/g2dotcom?trk=public_post-text). ##### The flagship event. 9,500+ enterprise AI leaders, functional tracks, curated matchmaking, and the stage that defines the industry each year.

[REGISTER](https://www.humanx.co/us/register)

The HumanX Promise

At HumanX, every attendee leaves better equipped to lead in the age of AI.

**LEARN**

Gain insight and inspiration from global AI leaders across stages, workshops, and case studies built for real-world application.

**CONNECT**

Build meaningful relationships through curated programs like SolutionBridge, VentureConnect, and Peer [X]change—where the right people meet with purpose.

**GO**

Through hands-on, collaborative sessions and ROI labs, you’ll define your next steps while onsite and leave knowing exactly how to execute them.
